title: Fig. 2 in E Va L U At I O N O F A L L E L I C C O N T E N T I N A N Experimental Alder (Alnus Spp.) Plantation
author: Voronova, Angelika
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. Polymorphism detection using electrophoretic separation of restriction enzyme digested PCR products and species-specific primers. A) Ptr1 (12F/R), CaiI; B) 5S rRNA gene, AdeI; C) Aln g 4 gene (2F/R), XapI; D) thiazole biosynthetic enzyme (s16 F/R), MspI; E) thiazole biosynthetic enzyme (s16 F/R), BshNI; F) pr10A gene (10 sB, 10sM, 10 F/R).
